name: Black Journey to the West
short_description: Black Journey to the West "is a vampire like survivor game that integrates Roguelike elements. Choose a character from a scripture gathering team, build character treasures and skills, challenge the blackened All Sky God Buddha, and shatter the darkness that envelops the Divine World.
detailed_description:
Black Journey to the West "is a vampire like survivor game that integrates Roguelike elements.

The game character has six equipment positions, each equipped with different skills. Each equipment can choose more than ten elements to embed, and each element will modify the effect of the skills, creating countless skill combinations with different effects.

There are button prompts at the entrance of the dungeon, but the prompts in the Heavenly Palace are not very prominent. I will put a prompt image here

supported_languages: Simplified Chinese, English, Russian, Japanese, Korean
